---
title: "Tutorial for using `hydroPSO` to calibrate `TUWmodel`"
author: 
- "Mauricio Zambrano-Bigiarini"
date: "v1.0, May 25th, 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: 
    number_sections: true
    fig_caption: yes
  html_document: 
    number_sections: true
urlcolor: blue
subtitle: 'Study area: Trancura River Basin, Chile'
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Tutorial for using `hydroPSO` to calibrate `TUWmodel`}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

A detailed tutorial on using `hydroPSO` to calibrate `TUWmodel` is available at [https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20386045](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20386045).
